programme.desc: Share in the fun with YouTube star EvanTubeHD, his sister JillianTubeHD, and the whole Tube Family!

programme.title: Winx Club
programme.desc: Winx Club is a fantasy saga revolving around six fairies and their adventures. The protagonists Bloom, Stella, Flora, Aisha, Tecna and Musa live their daily life on Magix world, among lessons, loves, quarrels and moments of strong friendship. At any moment, when needed, they can transform into super-heroines, ready to defeat evil and save who is in danger.

programme.title: LOL Block
programme.desc: A crazy collection of hilarious comedy series featuring shows like, Elvis and Benny, Eliot Kid, Angelo Rules, and, Kung Food!

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city's sewers transform into Indiana Jones' white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you've entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Pincode
programme.desc: Grown up Kikoriki characters rock the world with their scientific superpowers and tell the kids scientific facts in a most entertaining way. The crew follows Captain Pin as they learn about the world we live in and share this knowledge with us.

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn't! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can't help being sucked in by Moose's relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Back to Back
programme.desc: Embark on an electrifying journey as they boldly leap from one heart-pounding expedition to the next, fueled by their unbreakable bond and insatiable thirst for excitement. Get ready to be swept away in a whirlwind of adrenaline-pumping quests, where danger and discovery await them at every turn.

programme.title: Future Card Buddyfight
programme.desc: It is the year 2030, and the stage is the capital of Japan, Chou-Tokyo. Through "Buddyfight", humans have started cultural interactions with residents from other worlds called "Affinity Dimensions". Buddyfight is a game with selected humans as the "Buddyfighter", and residents from the other world as the partner (known as "Buddy Monster"). These battles have high significance and sometimes it is even used to decide the fate of a nation, and naturally there are those who seek to use the Buddy Monsters for evil purposes.

programme.title: I'll Get You! Holiday
programme.desc: The action takes place in all year round resort, where Wolf doesn't chase Hare to eat him anymore: now it's all about sports and competition. However, in his crazy chase after recognition and victories the grey hooligan often uses methods that aren't really fair, which provokes awkward and funny situations.

programme.title: Bat Pat
programme.desc: The series follows the comedy adventures of Bat Pat and the Silver brothers Martin, Leo and Rebecca as they unravel mysteries and cross paths with supernatural creatures of the night that lurk, haunt, shriek and dig themselves up in every dark corner of their home in Fogville, a small town that seems to be the center of all things weird in the world, a veritable magnet to ghosts, mummies, witches, creatures, werewolves and things that go bump in the night. Bat Pat will prove that the supernatural isn't always evil but just misunderstood. Our heroes will come to understand something important: the supernatural “bad guys” are not really bad, but normal people whose actions are misunderstood by the more inhabitants of Fogville and what they really want is... just help!

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green's new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he's the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: TOBOT
programme.desc: Ryan and Kory are twin brothers with one big secret: They're Tobot pilots.

programme.title: Roger
programme.desc: The lively adventures of a little girl, the carefree, joyful and occasionally perky Fatou, and an alien, the clumsy Roger, on a tropical island… Throughout their adventures, they trigger small accidents that sometimes grow into major disasters, but (almost) always end on a happy note. In short, Roger and Fatou spend their time saving the island from their own mistakes and blunders.

programme.title: Bakugan: Battle Planet: Stratified / Maze Daze

programme.desc: Hey Happy Campers! Today at camp, we're playing volleyball, experimenting with self-inflating balloons, balancing in yoga, and playing clapping games like Old Lady's Cat! Get ready for an exciting day!

programme.desc: The birds are thrilled when the eggs start to speak - but who are the hatchlings going to take after?

programme.title: Angry Birds
programme.desc: A disguised Minion Pig manages to infiltrate the Blues, but will the little Angry Birds fall for his ruse?

programme.title: Rabbids Invasion
programme.desc: The Rabbids discover two cops with a radar gun on the side of the road. When the radar detects someone speeding, it lights up, which pleases the Rabbids so much that they'll do anything to get it to happen again. Castor Allalone, a scout without a patrol group, recruits the Rabbids to form his crew.

programme.title: Rabbids Invasion
programme.desc: The Rabbids are shut inside a supermarket after closing hours. The janitor has a radio, which the Rabbids gather around to dance. But there's a problem - they cause all sorts of interference when they get too close to the radio. A Rabbid wants to meet up with his friends who are eating candy at the top of an escalator. Unfortunately, the escalator is moving in the opposite direction. The Rabbid tries all sorts of ideas to get up to his friends.

programme.title: Hero 108
programme.desc: There's a thief in Big Green. When the villain turns out to be a baby raccoon that Mystique Sonia has secretly adopted, Meanwhile ApeTrully has been captured by Pangolin Queen and turned into her spec

programme.desc: After First Squad defeats the Lizards in battle, Lizard King offers to join Big Green and learn more about human behavior. Back at the base, Lin Chung quickly grows suspicious of the King's true inten

programme.title: Masters of the Universe
programme.desc: Whilst visiting a village, Teela discovers further clues to her origins.

programme.title: Masters of the Universe
programme.sub-title: Rise of the Snake Men, Part 1
programme.desc: Evil-Lyn, Rattlor, and Kobra Khan steal Zodak's staff. He-Man gets new snake armor. Evil-Lyn betrays Skeletor by helping Rattlor and Kobra Khan free King Hiss and his Snake Men from the void. The Snake Men turn the other Evil Warriors to stone, summon a giant snake to devour Skeletor, and reclaim Snake Mountain, which grows two more snake heads.

programme.title: Masters of the Universe
programme.sub-title: Rise of the Snake Men, Part 2
programme.desc: Hiss decides to honor Evil-Lyn for her help by personally devouring her, but after probing her mind for knowledge of Grayskull, he spares her. She and the Snake Men besiege Castle Grayskull but are repelled by He-Man and the Masters. After invading the castle, Hiss poisons the Sorceress, weakening her. Meanwhile, He-Man petrifies Snake Face and knocks out Rattlor. The battle ends when Zodak defeats Hiss and throws him down Grayskull's mote, and the Snake Men follow him down. He-Man takes the Sorceress to the Elders, who neutralize the poison. Snake Mountain's extra two heads crumble. Skeletor blasts out of its floor, restores his Evil Warriors, and swears revenge on Evil-Lyn.

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Have you ever seen a talking slime? Well, meet Slick Slime Sam! He is pink, he is hilarious, and he is ready to help with your latest DIY or life hack project.

programme.title: Up All Night
programme.desc: We hope you're stocked up on caffeine and snacks because it's time to LOL all night long!

programme.title: Don Friesen
programme.desc: Husband. Idiot. Dad. His kids think he's fun. His wife thinks he's an idiot. Audiences think he's hilarious! Don is a modern suburban dad just trying to raise his kids and get through the day with a bit of money in the bank and a scrap of dignity intact. With a unique style that can best be described as frenetic and engaging, Don captures the irony of parenting, marriage and everyday absurdities through characters, voices, parodies and some of the best written routines around. He's a wanna-be geek who constantly upgrades to the latest technology, but can never get it to work, leading to signature bits about tech support, Idiots Guides, texting and passwords. Friesen has recently taken his smart, savvy, and highly-caffeinated comedy to the stage at the Alex Theatre in Glendale, CA, for the taping of his new Showtime one-hour special titled "Ask Your Mom." In his first nationally released concert special, Don delivers a winning hour of clever, true-to-life "he's talking about my family up there" comedy that manages to be adult-smart yet family-friendly.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Andy Gold has appeared in festivals and competitions all over the country, including the Boston Comedy Festival, San Diego Comedy Festival, Laugh Your Asheville Off and Comcast's Trial by Laughter Comedy Festival. Andy's comedy has also been featured on Hulu and Kevin Hart's Laugh out Loud network on Sirius XM.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Growing up, Vinnie Montez always wanted to be a police officer, a dream that he realized in 1998. His experiences as a cop are the foundation for his comedy you just can't make some of this stuff up.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Reno's journey began at the Punchline Comedy Club in Atlanta, GA where he tended bar to supplement his day job. He found himself on stage during the weekly open mic night. His unique outlook on life - mixed with a six-pack, was instantly popular.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Phil Kopczynski is a reluctant nice guy and father who just wants to occasionally play in the wilderness and regularly make city-dwellers laugh.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.sub-title: Tom Simmons: Peace, Love and Whatnot

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Energetic and in-your-face comedian Kabir Singh jokes about why serial killers are white, Indian stereotypes, and why Siri's racist.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Andrew's very personal and fun storytelling comedy, combined with his exemplary work ethic has earned him high praise from some of the best comedians in the business. Andrew is a featured writer, actor, and comedian on the TV show “UpLate NW.” Andrew has been featured on NBC, FOX, and the Bob & Tom Radio Show and is a regular opening act for Christopher Titus. Andrew was also featured on the popular Buzzfeed web series “Truth or Drink“, has performed in over 35 states and his new podcast called “Don't Quit Your Night Job” was featured in the Seattle Times.

programme.title: Keith Stubbs
programme.desc: Keith Stubbs is a 'triple threat' in showbiz and entertainment. He's a hilarious stand-up comedian, talented actor, and award-winning radio personality.Keith was twice voted 'Best Comedian' by City Weekly, the Standard-Examiner named him 'Funniest Comic' and he was a semi-finalist in Comedy Central's Laugh Riots comedy competition. The Utah-based comic has made television appearances on A&E's An Evening at the Improv, nationally syndicated Comedy.TV, ABC's America's Funniest People and has established himself as a funny, improvisational comic, host, roastmaster and emcee.Keith tours nationally and has shared the stage with showbiz legends Joan Rivers, Jeff Foxworthy, Bill Cosby, Jim Gaffigan, Sinbad, Gladys Knight, and Frank Caliendo. Keith was one of five comedians who performed for the athletes in the Olympic Village at the 2002 Winter Games.Keith was named Best Actor by City Weekly for his show-stopping, comedic performance as 'Vinnie Black' in the stage production of Tony 'n Tina's Wedding. Stubbs currently plays Rob Schneider's accountant in the TV series "Real Rob" on Netflix.For eight consecutive years, Keith was awarded "Best Radio Personality" by the Utah Broadcasters' Association for his time spent as host of "The Stubbs Show" on 101.5 The Eagle. He also hosted KEITH STUBBS SPORTS on ESPN700 in Salt Lake City and appeared nationally on CMT radio and the Blue Collar Comedy channel on SiriusXM.Keith is often recognized for being a clean comedian, although his audiences span a broad spectrum. One review said, "Keith was funny, period! He was clean but we hardly noticed because his comedy and style are so unique and spot on."

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: LUCAS BOHN is energetic with an edge. The perfect blend of schoolboy charm and bad-boy charisma, his comedy is both smart and audacious. Known as the little guy who generates big laughs, Lucas has shared the stage with Dave Chappelle, Jimmy Fallon, and Kevin Hart. Lucas' high-energy shows and hilarious impersonations make him an instant hit with audiences of all ages. In 2013 Lucas was nominated "Comedian of the Year" by Campus Activities Magazine.

programme.title: The Sisters Brothers

programme.title: Dragon Blade
programme.desc: When corrupt Roman leader Tiberius (Adrien Brody) arrives with a giant army to claim the Silk Road, Huo An (Jackie Chan) and his group of trained warriors teams up with an elite legion of defected Roman soldiers led by General Lucius (John Cusack) to maintain the delicate balance of power in the region. To protect his country and his new friends, Huo An gathers the warriors of thirty-six ethnic nations together to fight Tiberius in an incredible epic battle.

programme.title: Too Many Husbands

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: Bus driver Ralph Kramden and sanitation engineer Ed Norton are best friends who dream of making it big. Their most recent “get-rich-quick” plan finds the boys out to make their fortune by hiring a dog trainer to race their pet greyhound.

programme.title: Failure to Launch
programme.desc: Tripp, a 35 year-old who still lives with his parents. And who can blame him' It's free, he's got a great room, and mom does the laundry. Desperate to get him out of the house, his parents hire a gorgeous woman, Paula, to give him a little…push.

programme.title: A Thousand Words
programme.desc: Fast-talking agent Jack McCall (Eddie Murphy) has set his sights set on New Age guru Dr. Sinja. But after a mysterious Bodhi tree appears in his backyard, Jack realizes he better mend his ways before the last leaf falls from the tree or he's a goner.

programme.title: Last Vegas
programme.desc: Four lifelong best friends head to Las Vegas with a plan to stop acting their age and relive their glory days. Upon arriving, they quickly realize that the decades have transformed Sin City and tested their friendship in ways they never imagined.

programme.title: Leap Year
programme.desc: Leap Year follows one woman's quest to get married to the perfect guy…despite what fate has in store for her.

programme.desc: Emotional upheavals abound for a rich Texas oil family when their son and his friend fall for the same woman.

programme.title: Charade

programme.desc: When champion figure skater Claire becomes injured she is sent to a rehabilitation center in the snowy mountains where she meets and falls for a local ice fisherman who shows her there is more to life than competition.

programme.title: Christmas in The Heartland
programme.desc: Kara and Jessie strike up an unlikely friendship when seated next to each other on a plane headed to the heartland. With both girls visiting family they've never met, they devise a plan to switch places for Christmas.

programme.title: The Christmas Dance
programme.desc: Traumatized by her past Christmas is not at the top of Sarahs list this time of year. However, waltzing through lifes unexpected emergencies, she is taught the Christmas dance.

programme.title: The Wedding in the Hamptons
programme.desc: A designer debuts at a Hamptons wedding and is mistaken for a socialite and falls for a groomsman.

programme.title: Be Mine
programme.desc: A woman finds romance as she prepares to take over her mother's garden store.

programme.title: Been There All Along
programme.desc: Charley, the founder of a dating app must team up with marketing expert Liam, to save her company.

programme.title: The Wedding Rule
programme.desc: Gemma and Max, former childhood friends are bequeathed a restaurant but must pretend to be married.

programme.title: A Case Of Bachelor Abduction
programme.desc: Three friends investigate a mysterious woman who abducted and shamed two of them, using various tactics.

programme.title: My Ordinary Love Story
programme.desc: Eun-jin investigates her boyfriend to prove he's cheating. Yet as she digs deeper, she finds his dark secret.

programme.title: The Divine Move
programme.desc: Pro go player Tae-suk, framed for brother's murder by gambler Salsu, vows revenge, trains fiercely in prison.

programme.title: Beautiful Vampire
programme.desc: A beautiful 500-year-old vampire enjoys the quiet life until her new landlord and a new guy catches her eye.

programme.title: Mama's Hands
programme.desc: A woman, who was abused as a child by her mentally ill mother, sets out on a journey to find healing through forgiveness. She discovers that she may be too late.

programme.title: My New BFF
programme.desc: Jasmine becomes friends with Lisa, her new neighbor and current law student. Their relationship turns toxic when Lisa develops an obsession with Jasmine, putting her life, her friends, and family in danger.

programme.title: Noxious
programme.desc: Events over the course of one traumatic night in Georgia unfold as the reckless Kennedy discovers her lovers darkest secrets.

programme.title: Kingdom Men
programme.desc: Pasto Gerald's job is on the line if he doesn't increase the attendance of the men in the church. He decides to have a men's retreat hoping it will fix everything. Little did he know that he's in for the fight of his life. He realizes God didn't call him to increase the men at the church but help them.

programme.title: Married Men and Single Women
programme.desc: When three married men decide to step out on their marriages they get more than they bargained for. As each settle into lustful and emotional affairs with their mistresses, they soon find that infidelity has unpredictable and devastating consequences. Betrayal, hypocrisy, racism and several other matters surface as MARRIED MEN AND SINGLE WOMEN come together.

programme.title: A Little Bit of Heaven
programme.desc: New Orleans ad executive Marley Corbett (Kate Hudson) is a free-spirited woman who embraces her easy sexuality, shuns commitment, and gains support and strength from a close circle of friends. Then Marley learns she has terminal colon cancer. Despite her determination not to be tied down in a serious relationship, Marley finds herself falling in love with her handsome doctor (Gael García Bernal), even as her health slowly deteriorates.

programme.title: Survivor
programme.desc: Framed for crimes she did not commit, a British diplomat tries to prevent a terrorist attack on New York City.

programme.title: In Hell
programme.desc: Kyle LeBlanc (Jean-Claude Van Damme) is an honorable citizen who winds up incarcerated in Russia after he takes revenge on the man who murdered his wife, resulting in the killer's death. Unfortunately for Kyle, he is assigned to a prison that is renowned for its violence. Controlled by a corrupt and sadistic warden, the facility regularly holds brutal fights between inmates. In order to survive in the prison, Kyle must participate in the battles, even as he attempts to retain his humanity.

programme.title: Life of a King
programme.desc: An ex-felon on a path of redemption defies convention and establishes a Chess Club for inner-city teenagers.

programme.title: Icetastrophe
programme.desc: A piece of a meteor strikes the center of a small mountain town and causes deadly freezing temperatures.

programme.title: End Game
programme.desc: When Secret Service agent Alex Thomas (Cuba Gooding Jr.) acts too slowly to stop a crazed shooter, the president of the United States (Jack Scalia) is brutally shot in the middle of a press conference. In the wake of his death, journalist Kate Crawford (Angie Harmon) begins to suspect a massive conspiracy is afoot. Crawford convinces a skeptical Thomas to help her, and the two struggle to unravel the mystery behind the assassination -- before they become the next targets.

programme.title: Megafault
programme.desc: A seismologist and a miner must stop a massive earthquake that threatens to tear the world in half. Starring Brittany Murphy.

programme.title: Fatima Bramme Sey, Andre Atherley, Duane Atherley & Jonathan Geyevu
programme.sub-title: Blue Note Festival: Fatima and the Eglo Live Band
programme.desc: It is a true testament of her capabilities, talent and versatility that few vocalists can claim to have worked with such a diverse array of musicians as Fatima. Her list of collaborators includes Floating Points, Flako, Shafiq Husayn (Sa-Ra), Dam Funk, Scratcha DVA, Dorian Concept, Funkineven, Ras G, VeebeO and Teebs, to name but a few. Currently residing in East London, the velvet-toned Swede stuns with her gorgeous voice, candy-coated melodies and fresh take on modern soul. Fatima joined forces with The Eglo Live Band and has been touring around the world, from the Montreux Jazz Festival to Dimensions. In this broadcast, this unbelievably talented and soulful singer takes the stage with her live band at the unique and ethereal La Gaîté Lyrique in Paris.

programme.title: Grand Pianoramax, Nik Bärtsch & Stefan Rusconi
programme.desc: Jazzed Out proves that a jazz session can take place anywhere. Unusual locations, such as garage buildings, multi-storey car parks, street corners, subway trains, and parks, in several of the world's metropoles, provide the setting for brief jazz performances. The sheer rawness of the metropoles merge with the musical creations of various artists in search of the perfect ‘urban stage'. In this episode, Zurich serves as a backdrop for sets by pianist Stefan Rusconi, Grand Pianoramax, and Nik Bartsch.

programme.title: Jimmy Witherspoon & Rozaa Wortham
programme.desc: Since 1977, Estival is a summer jazz festival in Switzerland, Lugano. Estival offers a thrilling and particularly surprising line-up that explores the rich world of contemporary music whilst promoting the understanding of different cultures, tolerance, and co-existence. Jimmy Witherspoon and Rozaa Wortham, two incredible brilliant jazz musicians. Rozaa Wortham starts off the show with the Jimmy Witherspoon Quartet. Swinging and full of energy she performs ‘It Don't Mean A Thing'. Jimmy Witherspoon, known for the song “Ain't Nobody's Business” ends the show with some astounding lean-back blues.

programme.title: Christian McBride
programme.desc: Stingray DJAZZ

programme.title: Popa Chubby
programme.sub-title: Popa Chubby - It's A Mighty Hard Road
programme.desc: Popa Chubby, born as Ted Horowitz, is an American blues singer and guitarist, who has become one of the most popular figures of New York's blues scene. Early on in his career he released the album 'Booty and the Beast' (1995), which became one of the 1990s's best-selling blues albums. Chubby describes his own style as "The Stooges meets Buddy Guy, Motörhead meets Muddy Waters, and Jimi Hendrix meets Robert Johnson". As part of the French music festival Blues sur Seine, Chubby and his band played a great blues rock concert, showcasing the artist's powerful and soulful guitar playing. This performance was recorded at Théâtre Simone Signoret on November 8, 2019.

programme.title: Seasick Steve
programme.desc: Steven Gene Wold, commonly known as Seasick Steve, (born circa 1941) is an American bluesman, although he prefers to be called "a song and dance man". He plays guitars (mostly personalized), and sings, usually about his early life living rough and doing casual work.

programme.title: Metallica
programme.sub-title: Orion Festival: Tour Through the Never
programme.desc: Filmed at Orion Festival, Atlantic City, this concert film will give all fans a spectacular Live experience from start to finish. Classic Metallica featuring unforgettable version of their hits: 'One', 'Master Of Puppets', 'Sad But True', 'Seek & Destroy' and many more.

programme.title: Varados En El Paraíso
programme.desc: Una ejecutiva de recursos humanos pierde su trabajo y decide viajar a Puerto Rico para una conferencia de negocios. Cuando el viaje se convierte en un desastre y un huracán paraliza toda la isla, conoce a un apuesto viajero que le da una nueva perspectiva de la vida.

programme.title: Escríbeme en Navidad
programme.desc: Jessica envía tarjetas de Navidad a aquellos que son especiales para ella: la tía que la crió, su hermano, una estrella del pop que envejece, la maestra que la inspiró y su amiga que siempre dice la verdad. Actúan Torrey DeVitto, Chad Michael Murray.

programme.title: Navidad en Graceland
programme.desc: Cuando una ejecutiva viaja por negocios a Memphis se reencuentra con su antiguo amor, un promotor musical que le pide presentarse en el Concierto de Navidad de Graceland. Protagonizada por Kellie Pickler y Wes Brown.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.desc: This series follows a group of survivors during the zombie apocalypse. Sometimes the interpersonal conflicts present such danger that some grow willing to do anything to survive. Our survivors are devastated by Negan.

programme.title: Lost Gold Of World War II
programme.desc: Cuando un callejón sin salida amenaza acabar con la exploración, se abre una nueva oportunidad. Utilizando su mapa del Lirio Dorado recién descifrado, el equipo descubre nuevos puntos de acceso, con la esperanza de acceder al interior de la cascada.

programme.title: Lost Gold Of World War II
programme.desc: En la final de la temporada, el equipo por fin llega al espacio vacío bajo la cascada, desde donde pueden vislumbrar qué hay más adentro. Sin embargo, la emoción es interrumpida por unos visitantes inesperados que se interponen en su camino.

programme.title: Lost Gold Of World War II
programme.desc: El cazador de tesoros estadounidense John Casey regresa a las Filipinas con un nuevo equipo y nuevas tecnologías, con el objetivo de resolver uno de los más grandes misterios de la Segunda Guerra Mundial.

programme.title: Lost Gold Of World War II
programme.desc: Tras descubrir el marcador de una bomba, el equipo le llama a un experto en explosivos para que explore una cueva que podría haber sido el cuartel del general Yamashita. Adentro, descubren una posible trampa, así como la primera pista del tesoro.

programme.title: Lost Gold Of World War II
programme.desc: A falta de opciones, John planea perforar la montaña para ir bajo la cascada sin embargo, el clima dificulta mucho las cosas. Mientras tanto, Rick halla un artículo en la Grieta 6 que podría probar la presencia de los japoneses.

programme.title: Lost Gold Of World War II
programme.desc: Mientras que John y Rick trabajan juntos para descifrar un mapa del Lirio Dorado, la Grieta 6 revela su primera pieza del tesoro. Mientras tanto, a Levi y a Geo se les ocurre una solución creativa para atravesar un derrumbe misterioso en el túnel.

programme.title: Lost Gold Of World War II
programme.desc: Conforme el equipo llega al fondo de la Grieta 6, nuevas y sorprendentes pruebas indican que podrían haber llegado demasiado tarde. Mientras tanto, los mineros desencadenan un peligro en el túnel que los pone en riesgo.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Marco Mejía les dice a Eugenia y a Alfonso que confirmó que Jiménez Arroyo es la persona del Gobierno aliada con el narcotráfico. Aurelio se siente dueño de todo el negocio. Leo visita a Ponte.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: El Topo Galván le dice al Pollo que se aliará con Mónica porque va a necesitar los contactos colombianos que ella tiene. El Turco se entrevista con Randy y le pide un par de favores.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: El general Jiménez le dice a Marco que está dispuesto a hablar con el juez que le sea asignado, pero con la condición de que le den inmunidad a su esposa. Ramiro necesita localizar a Doris.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Casillas se ve obligado a contarle a Mónica que mató a don Cleto Letrán, mientras Irina no se controla. Alba aconseja a Heriberto que no siga los pasos de Aurelio porque no le hace nada bien.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Eugenia se entera de que Alejandro Negrete estuvo en el rancho de los Casillas. Aurelio llama a Mejía y le advierte que va en camino al periódico, cuando lee el artículo que su novia escribió.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Aurelio secuestra a Eugenia y se la lleva a una bodega. Heriberto está muy angustiado por el artículo publicado en el periódico sobre la desaparición de Alejandro Negrete.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: El Turco le niega a Ximena que Heriberto está ligado en la desaparición de Negrete, y ella le reclama a Chacorta. Alfonso llega a la bodega donde tienen a Eugenia: no puede creer lo que pasó.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Aurelio acusa a Mónica de delatarlo. Chacorta aconseja al Turco andarse con cuidado con Casillas porque es capaz de hacer cualquier cosa, ya que no tuvo reparos en asesinar a don Cleto.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan quiere marcharse lejos con sus hermanos para que Libia se olvide de ese amor, pero una verdad golpea el honor de la familia Reyes, mientras Bernardo esconde que es un hombre casado.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Al enterarse de la muerte y el engaño de Elizondo, Libia va a la hacienda. Se siente desamparada y no aguanta más al ser fuertemente humillada por Gabriela, la viuda de Bernardo, y sus hijas.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan, Óscar y Franco reconocen el cadáver de su hermana y acusan al hacendado como el asesino. Norma Elizondo se opone a las decisiones de su madre y desafía los deseos de su esposo Fernando.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Los Reyes consiguen la dirección de la hacienda de los Elizondo y van a reclamar justicia. Gabriela se siente agobiada y toma vacaciones en su casa de la Florida, viaja con Norma y Fernando.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Jimena y Sara Elizondo están cautivadas con los empleados que recibe Eva en la hacienda. Juan pelea con Franco por culpa de Rosario, la cantante del bar, y por oponerse a su venganza.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Óscar propone una manera de desquitarse de los Elizondo sin mancharse las manos de sangre. Gabriela regresa sin avisar y entrevista a los trabajadores, Juan no puede ocultar su rabia y dolor.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan acepta seducir a las Elizondo, sus hermanos se preocupan por su actitud al conocer a Norma. Gabriela presiona a su hija para que comience a corresponderle a Fernando como esposa.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Jimena cita a Franco en un parque y se besan, él quiere ir más allá. Norma y Fernando celebran su primer aniversario de matrimonio en el bar y él se deslumbra con la presentación de Rosario.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: La invitación a un rodeo en la hacienda es la ocasión perfecta para que Juan consiga la atención de Norma. Rosario termina con Franco para protegerlo y le prohíbe su entrada al bar.

programme.desc: Infieles - Caminos: Los caminos de Ozan y Asli se cruzan. A partir de ese momento, Asli queda grabada en la mente de Ozan y Ozan queda grabado en la mente de Asli.

programme.title: Infieles
programme.desc: Infieles - Nueva Etapa: Asli y Ozan entran en una nueva etapa en su relación y comienzan a pasar más tiempo en la casa vacía de Pelin, haciendo planes para el futuro.

programme.title: Infieles
programme.desc: Infieles - Fiesta de Verano: La suegra de Ozan, Leyla, planea una gran fiesta de verano. Durante los preparativos de esta fiesta, Ozan se encuentra una vez más con Asli.

programme.title: La Familia de mi Esposo
programme.desc: La Familia de mi Esposo - Preocupaciones: Zafer está cada vez más preocupado por su hijo desaparecido. Seniz oculta algo en relación a su descubrimiento sobre Tarik.

programme.title: La Familia de mi Esposo
programme.desc: La Familia de mi Esposo - Comienzan Las Jugadas: Engin se reúne con Zafer para meter ideas en su cabeza indirectamente. Seniz invita a Tarik y Yonca a su casa.

programme.title: La Familia de mi Esposo
programme.desc: La Familia de mi Esposo - Sospechas: Seniz quiere sacar a Tarik y Yonca del edificio. Tarik sospecha que Engin miente sobre su fractura, mientras que este se reúne con Mukadder y Hikmet.

programme.title: Volver a Amar
programme.desc: Volver a Amar - Esta Es Mi Vida: Fatih, en su afán de proteger a Zeynep termina discutiendo con ella. Meryem averigua que su hija está en el país y quiere reencontrarse con ella.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Después de la Fiesta: Eve Nine y la familia de Fatmagül están con ella en el hospital intentando entender lo que ha pasado. Selim pierde su anillo y los chicos se recuperan de una noche de fiesta.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Dilema: Eve Nine se encuentra en un terrible dilema. Mukaddes va a hablar con los Yaşaran para intentar llegar a un acuerdo. Mustafá llega en cuanto puede y muestra un lado que nadie esperaba. Fatmagül deja el hospital.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Kerim: Mukaddes se sale con la suya y llega a un acuerdo con el abogado de los Yaşaran. Eve Nine y Galip dudan de la culpabilidad de Kerim pero no tienen pruebas para defenderlo.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Búsqueda: Todos andan en busca de Fatmagül. Los Yaşaran se hacen cargo de todo y lograr encubrir evidencia. Eve Nine y Galip siguen en busca de respuestas. Kerim es capturado por la policía.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Habladurías: Remi ayuda a Fatmagül a no tomar una decisión desesperada. Eve Nine, las familias de Fatmagül y Mustafá luchan contra las habladurías del pueblo. Los padres de Mustafá piden ayuda a las autoridades.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Cambios: Selim y Erdogan hablan con sus padres. Fatmagül se prepara para un gran cambio en su vida. Mustafá sigue desesperado y jura vengarse cueste lo que cueste.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - La Verdad: La madre de Mustafá termina en el hopital. Kerim y Fatmagül se ven obligados a pasar tiempo juntos. Vural les confiesa la verdad a Selim y Erdogan. Los Yaşaran se enfrentan a un serio problema.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: José María, molesto, le dice a Josefina que su boda con Humberto fue una farsa. Manuel le pide a Adolfo que vaya a ver al papá de Matilde para ofrecerle ayuda económica en su nombre.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Rosario le dice a Matilde que el administrador se fue y doña Prudencia le señala que debería darle gusto. Adolfo llega a la casa de los papás de Matilde y le dice a don Hilario que Manuel lo manda para ofrecerle ayuda económica.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Matilde le dice al padre que se arrepiente de haberle dado esperanzas a Adolfo. Sorprendido de ver a Adolfo, Humberto le pregunta qué hace ahí, pero él le responde que se llama Felipe Santamaría y es el administrador de don Manuel.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Adolfo le dice a Matilde que es el momento de huir, puesto que si no es su hermano, será su madre quién le diga a Manuel su verdadera identidad. Ella le dice que se queda con Manuel porque se enamoró de él. Rosario le ruega a Adolfo que se marche.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Adolfo le aclara a Humberto que le va a dar el dinero que le pidió a Matilde y luego se va a ir, pero que volverá para matarlo si se le ocurre seguir extorsionando a su hermana.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Remigio cree que Santamaría y su ayudante son quienes se fugaron de San Juan de Ulúa. Humberto le dice a Matilde que tiene que convencer a su marido de quedarse unos días más en la hacienda.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Rosario le confirma a Prudencia que Manuel es su hijo y le pide que, pase lo que pase, nunca le diga a Manuel que es su mamá. El padre Urbano reta a Matilde por haber engañado a su esposo.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Remigio le dice a Adolfo que lo va a acompañar por si le falla la puntería. Manuel recibe la carta de Adolfo citándolo y Silvano le dice que no vaya, que tal vez lo quiera matar. Pero Manuel le responde que no hay motivos para temer.

programme.title: María, la del barrio

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Tita hace un plan para separar a Nandito de su mamá y le propone a su papá irse a Europa durante dos meses, María se rehusa a viajar con ellos. María le pide a Tita que deje de meterle malos pensamientos a Luis Fernando.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó
programme.desc: María quiere secuestrar al hijo de Montserrat para vengarse de ella. Pedro le dice a Dimitrio que lo ayudará a quedarse con toda la herencia de Benjamín si acepta venderle las tierras que quiere.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó
programme.desc: Rosario finalmente les cuenta a Alejandro y Montserrat la terrible verdad de su pasado. Dimitrio descubre a Adolfo besando a Josefina y lo golpea.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó
programme.desc: Carlota les cuenta a Montserrat y Alejandro que María intentó robarse a su hijo. Montserrat y Alejandro les piden a José Luis y Angélica que sean los padrinos de bautizo de su hijo y les dicen que se casarán de nuevo.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó
programme.desc: José Luis le advierte a Alejandro que no dejará de luchar por el amor de Montserrat. María le propone a José Luis que unan fuerzas para destruir el amor de Montserrat y Alejandro.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó
programme.desc: Alejandro le pide a Joaquín que sean socios para se haga cargo de todas sus tierras. Refugio descubre que Pedro golpeó a Esmeralda y está decidido a matarlo.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó
programme.desc: Refugio intenta matar a Pedro al ver cómo golpea a Nadia. Ezequiel encuentra a María investigando su hacienda. Ezequiel le ordena a Adolfo que mate a uno de sus trabajadores. José Luis enfurece al escuchar a Pedro llamarlo criminal.

programme.title: La desalmada
programme.desc: Ángela advierte a Isabela que no está dispuesta a que ella y Rigoberto la sigan utilizando. Rosalina sufre dolores en el vientre y teme que su bebé pueda estar en peligro. César Franco busca pruebas contra Octavio y recibe un disparo de Carmelo.

programme.title: La desalmada
programme.desc: Rafael ve a Isabela y Ángela discutiendo, y ella le hace creer que es porque tuvo un problema con Rigo. César Franco le dice a Miriam que Fernanda ya no quiere su ayuda para vengarse de Octavio.

programme.title: La desalmada
programme.desc: Fernanda se entera de que César Franco está herido y va a buscarlo a casa de su hermana. Juana le exige a Luis alejarse de Miriam, pues debe preocuparse por la madre de su hijo.

programme.title: La desalmada
programme.desc: Octavio está decidido a usar la información que tiene sobre Clara para arruinar la campaña de David. Rosalina le hace creer a su padre que Luis no es su novio para evitar que le haga daño.

programme.title: La desalmada
programme.desc: Rafael defiende a Brenda para evitar que pierda su parte de la empresa. Juana, Fernanda y César Franco ven a Julia besando a Octavio. Rigoberto le regala a Isabela un hermoso anillo de compromiso. Brenda acepta que se enamoró de Rafael.

programme.title: La desalmada
programme.desc: Fernanda le demuestra a Brenda lo triste que se siente. Mari se encuentra con Piero y le dice que ya terminó su relación con Gabriel. Rosalina decide no casarse con Luis y confiesa estar enamorada de otro hombre.

programme.title: La desalmada
programme.desc: Rafael se molesta al ver que Fernanda planea continuar con su amistad con Clara a pesar de su pasado. César Franco le entrega a Fernanda la grabación de Julia y Octavio para evitar que gane las elecciones.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche: Viva el domingo

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: Tras comenter varios destrozo, el gato de Doña Juana parece estar muerto y Doña Lucha tiene que darle la triste noticia.

programme.sub-title: Una luz al fondo del tinaco
programme.desc: María intenta lavar el tanque de agua y queda atrapada en él. En el almacén, Carmelo juega con Delfino y Betza. Doña Lucha no sabe que María está dentro del tinaco y prende la bomba.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: Tercer aniversario del coma de María, se apoya a San Hipoclorito arcángel, Albertano la recuerda y Doña Lucha se cree elegida, pide canonizar a Hipoclorito arcángel por milagroso y piensa que María debe morir, va al hospital y trata de desconectarla.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: Gracias a una película, Albertano descubre una manera poco inusual de sacar a María del coma. Albertano trata de poner en marcha su plan, pero es interrumpido por doña Lucha y Carmelo. Albertano seduce a María, quien despierta y sorprende a todos.

programme.desc: Martina quiere volverse influencer para mantenerse económicamente. El gobierno ha confiscado el departamento de Licha.

programme.desc: Plutarco y Gaby deciden irse a vivir a otro país junto a su hijo. Plácido quiere conseguir unas vacaciones para su familia.

programme.title: Rebelde

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Tras una artimaña de León, Reverte es despedido del colegio y Roberta les confiesa a sus compañeros que el profesor es su padre. Se hace una fiesta de despedida para Reverte y Miguel sufre un desmayo, es llevado al hospital y cae en estado de coma.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mía llora desesperada porque Miguel puede morir. León amenaza con destruir la carrera de Alma Rey sino saca a Roberta de la escuela. Raquel desenmascara las mentiras de Sol y la afirma que nunca podrá ser una top model por su estatura.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: León influye en los directivos de la escuela para expulsar a Roberta. Diego decide dejar la banda para proteger a Roberta de su papá. Mía se siente orgullosa de Franco y le pregunta si Miguel algún día abrirá los ojos.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Roberta, Diego y Martín Reverte arman un plan para que León sea encarcelado por los fraudes que cometió, pero León los descubre y lo impide. Alma llama a León para informarle que un amigo de ella tiene información comprometedora sobre él.

programme.title: Rebelde

programme.title: Rebelde

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: La violencia se ha apoderado de las vidas de miles de mujeres que han sido asesinadas brutalmente por sus propias parejas, por lo que los movimientos contra feminicidios han incrementado considerablemente.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Algunos fueron perseguidos y separados de sus familias, otros llevados a campos de concentración y exterminados, hoy, algunos de los sobrevivientes narran el horror del holocausto judío.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Una mujer de buen corazón es asesinada por su esposo, un hombre manipulador y frío quien dejó abandonada a su propia hija en los brazos de su madre fallecida.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: El tiempo parece moverse en cámara lenta para familiares, amigos y conocidos de personas que han sido víctimas de diferentes crímenes que, desgraciadamente, muchas veces no logran ser resueltos.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Tras múltiples denuncias, una red de oscuros secretos y abusos a menores es descubierta. Los líderes de una iglesia se ven envueltos en terribles crímenes que tendrán que pagar en prisión.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: El tráfico ilegal de personas entre República Dominicana y Puerto Rico ha aumentado en los últimos meses, las autoridades hacen todo lo que pueden para mejorar la situación.

programme.desc: Las noticias más importantes del día y los temas de interés para la audiencia hispana en los EE. UU.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Un programa de reconocida trayectoria, en el que se presentan especiales de reportajes de investigaciones periodísticas de temas de actualidad, de vanguardia, de opinión pública y de problemáticas sociales, este además tiene su faceta ligera y algunas veces incluye episodios con entrevistas exclusivas de los famosos y personajes que están haciendo noticia. El show despliega un panorama actual de los hechos más importantes del mundo y especialmente de las comunidades iberoamericanas, realizado por un grupo de periodistas reconocidos e importantes, cuyos trabajos profesionales han sido amplios, ellos tienen años de experiencia en el área del periodismo y son muy profesionales a la hora de presentar sus reportajes, teniendo en cuenta siempre la responsabilidad que tienen ante el público.

programme.title: Crónicas: Historias que hacen historia
programme.desc: Un programa de noticias y temas de actualidad, con una historia diferente cada semana.

programme.desc: Las noticias más importantes del día y los temas de interés para la audiencia hispana en los EE. UU.

programme.title: ¡Despierta América!
programme.desc: El programa de variedad mañanero de entretenimiento, en el cual se incluyen las noticias de primera plana a nivel nacional y mundial, los temas de interés general, lo nuevo en la televisión, entrevistas con personajes famosos que están haciendo noticia, recetas de cocina, consejos útiles, concursos, moda y estilo, los chismes en el mundo de la farándula, parodias y mucho más. Este show que se ha transmitido y ha alegrado a su audiencia por más de una década, es ligero, ameno y divertido, ha mantenido al público informado de una forma jovial y casual.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter | Dusty Porsche 356 Speedster and an all-original Shelby GT500
programme.desc: In this episode of Barn Find Hunter, Tom Cotter talks with a woman with a dusty 1957 Porsche 356 A Speedster that she and her husband have owned since the 1960s. After that, Tom heads to his hometown and shows a stash of rare barn finds.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter | GM muscle cars, rotary Mazdas, and Ford Broncos
programme.desc: Tom Cotter stumbles upon some GM muscle cars, including a Buick GS Stage 1 and some Oldmobile 442s. Next, Tom finds an interesting old Mazda RX-4 along with a stash of some vintage Ford Broncos.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter | Impala, Eagle, Galaxie, Pinto and MORE!
programme.desc: Tom Cotter checks out a 1964 Impala SS, a lifted AMC Eagle 4x4, a 1963 Ford Galaxie 500 Convertible, and some Ford Pinto race cars with SCCA and IMSA race history.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter | Inherited barn find collection and a wild fiberglass coupe
programme.desc: Tom Cotter meets two brothers who just inherited a lifetime collection of eclectic cars. After that, Tom finds an extremely unique fiberglass coupe that once ran on "half of a Deusenberg" engine.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter | Lamborghini kit car and basement full of cool cars
programme.desc: Tom Cotter finds some interesting cars in the basement of a large house in a residential neighborhood in Southern Utah. Next, Tom is in Georgia where finds a 1965 Ford Fairlane with a 289 V-8 and 4-speed manual transmission.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter | Low-mileage Datsun, imported Ferrari, Swedish classics and a 289 Cobra name "Dirtbag"
programme.desc: Tom Cotter brings us a vast array of interesting barn finds from a low-mileage Datsun 510 to a imported Ferrari 400i. After finding a few Swedish classics in Michigan, Tom gets the story of how a 289 Cobra got the nickname, "Dirtbag."

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter | Millon-dollar Barn Find!
programme.desc: Tom Cotter helps "unearth" a 1952 Pegaso Z102, one of only 85 made, from a California garage. Next, we find Tom in South Carolina where he finds a plethora of American muscle cars, including a one-owner Plymouth Cuda.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter | Muscle Car Dreamland and Elvis' Lincoln Continental
programme.desc: Tom Cotter finds a stash of muscle cars in Georgia before discovering an interesting Lincoln Continental that possibly belonged to Elvis Presley.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter | Oldsmobiles, Mopars, Pontiacs and Fords!
programme.desc: Tom Cotter finds Oldsmobile barn find heaven (with some Mopars and Pontiacs sprinkled in for good measure). After that, Tom stumbles upon a 1970 Shelby Mustang GT500 buried in a garage, but in amazing condition.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter | One-off fiberglass kit cars and a Cheetah Transporter
programme.desc: Tom Cotter explores the wild world of one-off fiberglass kit cars. After that he uncovers a unique Cheetah Transporter.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter | Prototype Mercedes Gullwing found in storage unit!
programme.desc: Tom Cotter brings us to a storage unit in an undisclosed location where an amazing prototype Mercedes-Benz 300SL Gullwing sits in completely unrestored condition. Tom then finds himself in California with some old Fords and Mercurys.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter | RARE Ford Country Squire Wagon & Rust-free finds in Arizona
programme.desc: Tom Cotter finds a factory "hot rod" 1 of 1 Ford Country Squire Wagon in suburban Detroit. Next, we find Tom near Lake Havasu in Arizona where the dry weather has been kind to cars left outside for decades.

programme.title: Jacques Pepin Fast Food My Way
programme.desc: Jacques gets inspired at the market. Scrambled Eggs on Tomato Jus can be enhanced by the addition of cheeses, vegetables, and herbs. Grilled Striped Bass with Pimento Relish can be varied by using the freshest fish and herbs available. Jacques also introduces the beautifully refreshing Pink Grapefruit Terrine, as well as the Asian inspired Cauliflower with Scallions and Sesame Oil.

programme.title: Jacques Pepin Fast Food My Way
programme.desc: When guests stop by and leave little time for preparation, there are easy fix-its. Tuna Tomatoes and Salmon Tartare on Cauliflower Salad are beautiful "do ahead" dishes for lunch or a first course. Breaded Pork Scaloppine with Mushroom Sauce, Chickpea Ragout and Caramelized Peaches can be prepared as a perfect evening supper.

programme.title: Jacques Pepin Fast Food My Way
programme.desc: Jacques believes in great food everyday. As long as the ingredients are on hand, Prosciutto and Figs or Crab Cakes in Red Sauce need not be saved for special occasions. Pasta, Ham, and Vegetable Gratin can make use of leftover meats and vegetables and creates a nice balance when served with a salad of Romaine and Radicchio with Salsa Dressing. Big Almond Macaroons make any day feel special.

programme.title: Jacques Pepin Fast Food My Way
programme.desc: Inspired by his mother, Jeannette, Jacques prepares an Egg and Tomato Gratin and Greens with Quick Cream Dressing. His wife Gloria inspired the first course, Smoked Whitefish Tartine. Stuffed Scallops on Mushroom Rice and Pineapple Wedges in Caramel would inspire anyone wanting great food!

programme.title: Jacques Pepin Fast Food My Way
programme.desc: A sit-down dinner with family and friends doesn't have to be formal. Devil Shrimp, Sausage and Potato Packets with Homemade Mustard, Mushroom and Walnut Salad in Sour Cream Dressing, and Apple Peel Granité with Apple Purée are dishes that bring the ease of a picnic inside. Jacques assembles a plate full of Basil, Cheese, Fig, and Nut Bites, an easy light lunch or a perfect cheese course.

programme.title: Jacques Pepin Fast Food My Way
programme.desc: Sometimes the key to fast food is a well-stocked refrigerator and pantry. Leftover vegetables become a Pépin favorite with Jacques' Instant Vegetable Soup, also known as "fridge soup." By combining a few fresh products and kitchen staples, it is simple to prepare a Lavash Pizza, Halibut on Fresh Polenta with Pepper Oil, Pole Beans with Shallots, and Hasty Pudding with Apricot Sauce.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Greece is a cornucopia of age-old natural superfoods. Diane invites a well-known dietician and together they prepare a healthy meal brimming with Greek superfoods including a Spiced Carrot Soup Three Ways, a Black-Eyed Pea Salad with Dried Figs, Pomegranate, EVOO and Herbs and a dessert of wheat kernels, Greek honey, nuts, and dried fruits called Varvara.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane prepares a dinner party meal for a handful of her closest friends. Diane provides helpful tips to alleviate the stress that comes with planning a dinner party and provides easy recipes that are healthy and delicious. On the menu: Char-Broiled Cabbage "Steaks" with Pomegranate Seeds and Lemon Zest, Whole Baked Fish with Leeks, and Greek Yogurt Panna Cotta.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas

programme.desc: Diane and Chef Lefteris Lazarou, often called the father of modern Greek cuisine, explore the fish market and Diane gets a few lessons on how to choose the best seafood. programme.title: Business Issues
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Lou deal with a terrible boss and his instigating employees. Next, Lou, Froy, and Lyndah deal with a debtor with issues when they take possession of a taco truck. And Finally, Matt, Lou, and Sonia take on a big repo at a dealership and come out with six cars.

programme.title: Wrench in the Works
programme.desc: First, a wrench is thrown in the works, and at the car, when Froy and Matt try to repo from a plumber. Then, the duo go out again to try to repo a car from a slap-happy debtor, but unfortunately the car has a boot on it. And finally, Froy, Matt, Lyndah, and Sonia head out to the ranch to repo a tractor from some pushy ranch hands.

programme.title: Hidden Cars and Higher Powers
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy get some help from a friendly gardener that lead them to discover a car hidden in the backyard. Next, Matt and Froy go on another repo to repossess from a preacher that believes it would be blasphemy to repo his car. And finally, cops arrive in the middle of what may be Matt and Froy's last repo. Lou has to swoop in and smooth out the situation.

programme.title: Rolling Away
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Froy have to push away a debtor while trying to push a classic car up a hill and onto the flatbed. And later, Matt and Froy head out on a repo for a BMW, but when the camera guy refuses to leave the car and Matt's lunch starts to get to him, things go terribly wrong in what could be the worst repo in the history of EGA Recovery.

programme.title: Matt's Back
programme.desc: Froy and Mike, the new guy, repo a car at a paintball range. When the scene gets out of control, Matt swoops in out of nowhere and saves the day. Then, Sonia and Froy repo a high-end luxury sedan from a snooty pair of Brits in the high-rent district. Finally, Matt and Lou head to a dangerous job with Matt's biggest... and smallest fan.

programme.title: Burgers, Bottles, and Hustlers
programme.desc: Lou and Sonia repo a compact sedan from a trio of gun-wielding, bottle-breaking gangsta gals. Then, Matt and Froy get some fast food when they deal with an irate burger-slinger who won't honor Matt's order for his car. Finally, Sonia and Froy come face-to-face with a small time hustler and a gaggle of ladies in his employ.

programme.title: Strapped on the Court
programme.desc: Matt and Froy have to choose between the job and their lives when they're confronted by a dozen gun-toting basketball players. Then, Lou and Sonia have to crash a night-time family reunion to get their car. And finally, Lou and Lyndah think they are going to repo a Chevy van from wounded veterans, but the veterans aren't what they seem.

programme.title: Role-players and Blade Swayers
programme.desc: Lou, Matt, and Froy get interrupted on a routine job by a registered owner with an unregistered blade. Then, Matt and Froy head out to the country to reclaim a Prius from a quintet of socially maladapted role-players.

programme.title: Caught with Their Pants Down
programme.desc: Sonia and Froy's relationship takes a strange turn on a repo that puts them face-to-face with two strangers caught with their pants down. Then, Lou and Lyndah head to a remote ranch where they confront a duo of indecent roughnecks. And finally, pool cues and go jacks go flying when Froy, Matt, and Lou visit a local pool hall.

programme.title: Honor Rolling Away
programme.desc: Sonia and Lyndah find themselves at a local University trying to reclaim a car from a not-so-honorable honor roll student with a squeaky voice. Then, Matt and Sonia are tasked with snagging a tricked-out race car from two vested thugs armed with golf clubs. Finally, Lou and Sonia head to a fancy part of town to repo an Escalade from a young professional and his unsupportive wife.

programme.title: Tazed and Amazed
programme.desc: Matt and Froy need to call in the cops to help out with an inebriated old-timer armed with a tazer. Then, on a journey for a Journey, Lou and Froy battle with a bowler. And finally, Froy and Lyndah deal with a back peddling super-sized owner of a Nissan Altima.

programme.title: Intoxicated Marina Idiots
programme.desc: First, Lou and Sonia are on a hunt for a 2007 Porsche & a 2008 Audi from the same drug dealing debtor. Next, Matt and Froy pry a truck from a group of intoxicated idiots at a marina. And finally, Matt and Lou hit up an upscale Glendale neighborhood to scoop up a BMW from a shoe throwing rich couple.

programme.title: Playing the Role
programme.desc: First, Lou devises a plan to have Froy and Sonia pose as house buyers, and a happy married couple, meanwhile Matt and Lou will hook and book. Then, Matt and Froy wrangle with an out-of-work actor who's lost track of the line between his identity and his latest role. Finally, Froy and Lyndah need to figure out how to get a car from an angry owner, and the competing repo company that got to the job first.

programme.title: Broken Bones and Broken Phones
programme.desc: First, Froy, Lou, and Matt wrestle a group of body builders when going after a Jeep Commander. Next, an unemployed stock broker gets a rude awakening when Lou and Lyndah wake him up inside his car. And finally, Froy learns why you should never text and not drive to pick up Sonia, because she breaks his phone in two.

programme.title: The Hearse Isn't Empty?
programme.desc: Matt and Lou find themselves in an upscale neighborhood, facing off with a distraught accountant and his belligerent, kick-happy son. Then, Sonia and Froy crash a pool party where the guests were happy to give up their clothes, but they're not willing to give up their car. Finally, Matt and Lou encounter a hearse that they've been tracking for weeks, but before they're able to hook it up, they've got to figure out what's in the back

programme.title: Lucky Dog
programme.desc: Before a young, energetic Golden Retriever can be a companion for a family, Brandon will have to teach him control and how to safely navigate around wheelchairs.

programme.title: Ready, Set, Pet
programme.desc: Simone is looking for a high energy pup to keep her company in her studio apartment, and her sister Shawn is coming along to help her make the right decision.

programme.title: Ready, Set, Pet
programme.desc: Amy, Scott and their kids are waiting to get matched with a dog released from a seeing-eye training program. While Mom and the kids want a puppy, Dad would like an older dog.

programme.title: A Dog For Life
programme.desc: The Madurai's are both doctors looking for a furkid who will ease them into the idea of parenthood: a dog that is not too much hard work, that likes being calm at home, and importantly, a dog that doesn't mess too much. Mike is a 28-year-old epileptic man, suffering from grand-mal seizures. His seizures were so unmanaged and unpredictable that he didn't leave his flat for months. He's been matched with a seizure response medic alert dog, Jewel, who is able to give him confidence to live a full life.

programme.title: A Dog For Life
programme.desc: Janneke and her crazy Boston terrier, Rocky, are looking for a new furkid. Rocky misses his first buddy, a Golden retriever who recently moved out, and so it's time to bring a new running buddy home. The Mason family are a "modern family" – Mom, stepdad, granny and daughter all under one roof. They're solid, private folk looking for a puppy for their clever, sporty and accomplished 16 year old daughter.

programme.title: A Dog For Life
programme.desc: Glens and her husband of 52 years are at war. Over a dog. Glens has macular degeneration, and is steadily going blind. It is her goal to find a clever companion dog, a well-mannered and lovely tempered dog that will suffer the grandchildren and with great hope, be her guide. Jay struggles with anxiety, but when she met Tank, she knew that owning a dog would demand presence, and ultimately decided that a dog would be a far better match than the human kind.

programme.title: The Wildlife Docs
programme.desc: A family of bush babies lives a nocturnal life inside Curiosity Caverns at the park. Dr. Pete and The Wildlife Docs attempt to rid a stubborn cyst on mother Olivia, and prepare son TJ for a very important trip. Plus, a common loon is found struggling after ingesting a fishing hook. The Wildlife Docs attempt to remove the hook using non-invasive procedures, but to no avail. Now, they must resort to surgery. Can they save the loon?

programme.title: The Wildlife Docs
programme.sub-title: The Best of The Big Three
programme.desc: Meet the five Asian elephants at the park as they enjoy a fantastic day! First, they are searching for their favorite foods in contraptions the keepers have set up to give them a mental exercise and then a treat. They get to enjoy a spa day, well at least an elephant's version of a pedicure. Next, experience the life of a hippo from above and below. The Animal Care Specialists teach the three hippos behaviors to help the Wildlife Docs give check ups, examine teeth and even get X-rays, all in the name of hippo health care! Then it's off to the Serengeti Plain where a baby rhino is learning how to be a big rhino from his mother.

programme.title: The Wildlife Docs
programme.desc: Experience the fascinating world of the anteater. Today, Adelhi, a giant anteater, is here for her first check up since she gave birth. Find out what she and the baby have to reveal. Then Pebbles and Bam Bam, two lesser anteaters, visit The Wildlife Docs. Plus, each year, Busch Gardens Tampa donates their time to saving wild birds of prey throughout the state of Florida. A type of falcon called the crested caracara has made it's way to the Animal Care Center and it's up to The Wildlife Docs to save the life of this rare bird.

programme.title: The Wildlife Docs
programme.desc: The Wildlife Docs closely monitor Harry the two-toed Sloth to determine whether he is healthy enough to continue his work on the park's Animal Ambassador team. Plus, the gazelle is one type of antelope built to take the heat! Witness The Wildlife Docs as they head to the park's 65-acre Serengeti Plain for a house call, equipped with the tools to keep these gorgeous grazers healthy from horn to hoof.

programme.title: The Wildlife Docs
programme.desc: When one baby kangaroo's mother is no longer able to care for him, a dedicated Animal Care Specialist steps in to raise him by hand. The team must work together to save this joey's life. A little over a year ago, the tiger team celebrated the birth of three Malayan tiger cubs. But the celebration was short lived when Rukyah, the youngest of the cubs, was diagnosed with a life-threatening disease, one never seen in tigers before. What happened next was nothing short of a miracle.

programme.title: The Wildlife Docs
programme.desc: Samantha, an older female chimp, must undergo medical treatment before she can celebrate her birthday with the rest of the chimp community complete with a cake, cupcakes, popsicles, and party favors. Family feuds and squabbles, sibling rivalries, and power struggles... sounds like a reality television show but it's also how the meerkat lives its life. Watch the clever way The Wildlife Docs deal with the meerkat medical checkups, while creating a brand new habitat for these cute and cunning critters.

programme.title: Dr. Chris Pet Vet
programme.desc: It's a night of emergencies as veterinarian Chris Brown makes a house call to help a dog who leapt out of a moving car to chase a cat. On the other side of town, a manhunt begins for an orphaned kitty who needs help, and Lisa has her hands full with a sick puppy.

programme.desc: Veterinarian Chris Brown becomes attached to his latest patients: two boxer puppies without a home. A stray kitten is brought in to the clinic, but will it be too late for Chris to help? And Lisa must try to save a dog with a deadly snakebite.

programme.title: Turquoise Waters: Philippines

programme.title: A Day in Paradise 1
programme.desc: A graciously flowing four hour long pure nature relaxation experience, "A Day In Paradise" immerses viewers in the sights and sounds of one of the world's most pure and picturesque tropical islands - for an entire day from sunrise, to sunset. Filmed in 2013 by David Huting, the tiny island is hidden off of the northeastern coast of the outer Fiji Islands (near Taveuni), and boasts a perfect white sandy beach, groves of palm trees, and a majestic lagoon that shelters the island from all sides. It has more turtle visitors than humans!

programme.title: Dazzling Blue Lakeshore
programme.desc: Relax for one full hour on the stunningly blue shoreline of New Zealand's famous Lake Pukaki and enjoy the mesmerizing sights of blue water illuminating, clouds, and waves. Filmed in January 2017 on New Zealand's South Island.

programme.title: Diverse Perspectives: Hispanic Artists Now III
programme.desc: Diverse Perspectives: Hispanic Artists Now E3 — This art collection of real & imagined landscapes, soulful abstract work, & vivid surrealist portraits offers a colorful exploration Hispanic culture. The music includes rhythmic electro, percussive afro-beats, & soft-house with a modern Latin edge.

programme.title: Zen Evenings
programme.desc: Black & White E1 — An extraordinary art collection that embodies timeless beauty and sophistication. Each piece, crafted with a monochromatic palette, reveals the exquisite interplay of light and shadow. From captivating landscapes to evocative portraits, these black and white images evoke a sense of refined elegance, transporting viewers to a realm of tasteful minimalism.

programme.title: Zen Evenings
